name: 3M™ Foodservice Printed Label Tape
short_description: Preprinted with “Item,” “Time,” Prepared By” and “Date.” Ideal for label and rotation. Text repeats every 3.75 inches, providing up to 540 labels. Sticks to a variety of surfaces and is easy to write on. Adhesive meets FDA standards for indirect food contact. Heat stable application to 160°F and cold stable application from -10°F to 40°F. Removes easily – even after storing, heating or cooling.
benefits: Sticks to a variety of surfaces and is easy to write on.
Adhesive meets FDA standards for indirect food contact.
